raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is against CITIBANK XXXX XXXX disputes dept. 
previous inquiry XXXX Citi XXXX ( cc ) refused to investigate my dispute at all even though I sent them proof that the merchant overcharged me. After refusing to contact the merchant or even consider my proof they immediately ruled against me and assessed the entire XXXX amount to my account. No one would tell me how to contact an executive cc office. I later called disputes again and spoke to, finally, a reasonable person who saw all of my proof and immediately put the matter in dispute again but the cc did nothing and still refused to contact the merchant to investigate my dispute. 
At this point, XX/XX/year>, I was convinced the cc was making every effort to steal my money so I contacted the merchant directly and they admitted overcharging me by {$160.00} and immediately credited my account for same. I saw the credit as pending for 1 day and it disappeared but the cc still left the XXXX  amount in my acct. On XX/XX/year> I received an email from cc stating ACTION REQUIRED, WERE STILL MISSING SOME IMPORTANT INFORMATION and this was AFTER the merchant already credited my account for the overcharge when I contacted them but the cc was still determined to continue frustrating and cheating me hoping I would give up. 
cc email stated " We need additional information from you regarding your dispute. A letter requesting additional information is available inNotices and Letters. You can access it anytime atCitiOnline. Take a look and get back to us so we can resolve your dispute as quickly as possible. This letter has also been sent to you via mail, so keep an eye out. '' In conclusion, this entire dispute scam that the XXXX  at cc pull is illegal because they investigate nothing and just want to steal the consumer 's money and good credit. They have done this to me before on another dispute from a known internet crook and now Citigroup Faces Lawsuit Over Alleged Failure to Protect Customers from Online Scams. The cc should be criminally charged for causing these scams in their fictitious disputes department where again I had investigate and solve my own dispute because the cc do nothing except try to steal consumer money. 
Dont even get me started on cc checking bonus scam that I feel victim along with many others. Where is the consumer protection by the cfpb when all of cc XXXX  scams are disclosed and where is the occ oversight, supervision, auditing, etc.? Citi is not a bank, it is a home for XXXX  who are trying to make up for their horrible bad management losses by stealing money from consumers whenever possible.
